dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.recentRequestsDescription: Latest requests from the current team within the recent 24 hours.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Review monthly usage history for the current team, including cost, requests, token usage, and model breakdown.
analytics.distributionDescription: Review request share and token usage for each model within the selected month.
analytics.distributionEmpty: No model usage in this month yet.
analytics.tableDescription: The current month shows a live summary, while previous months come from archived monthly records.

messages.deleteRequiresOwner: Only team owners can delete the current team.
messages.deleteRequiresAnotherTeam: You must keep at least one team in your account before deleting this one.

general.basicInfoDescription: Update the current team name and review the active invitation link.
general.allowJoin: Allow users to join via invite link
general.allowJoinEnabled: Users with a valid invite link can join this team.
general.allowJoinDisabled: New users cannot join this team through invite links right now.

plan.title: Team Plan
plan.description: Upgrade to Pro to unlock more members and API key slots.

members.inviteDescription: Share the invitation link to let users join the current team. When seats are full, invitees will see a warning.
members.limitReached: The current team has no remaining seats. New users cannot join until a seat is freed.
members.manageDescription: Owners can change member roles and remove members from the team.
members.readonlyDescription: Only team owners can change roles or remove members.
members.confirmRemoveDescription: The member will immediately lose access to the current team after removal.

messages.lastOwner: At least one owner must remain in the team.
messages.selfRemoveBlocked: You cannot remove yourself from this page.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting the team will remove the workspace for all members. This action cannot be undone.

confirmDelete.title: Delete current team?
confirmDelete.description: This will remove the current team and all team-scoped data for every member.

join.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify the invitation.
join.successDescription: You have joined the invited team successfully.
join.alreadyMemberDescription: Your account is already a member of the invited team.
join.fullDescription: The team has reached its member limit. Please contact the team owner to free up a seat.
join.notFoundDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
join.joinBlockedDescription: This team is not accepting new members through invite links at the moment.
join.teamDisabledDescription: This team has been disabled and is not accepting access right now.
join.errorDescription: We could not process this invitation right now.

accessTokens.title: Access Tokens
accessTokens.description: Manage access tokens for programmatic team management via OpenAPI.
accessTokens.name: Token Name

messages.copyWarning: Please copy the token now. You will not be able to see it again.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this access token?
confirmDelete.description: Applications using this token will no longer have access.

teams.title: Teams
teams.detailDescription: Review team information and update limits.

recharge.title: Direct Recharge
recharge.description: Recharge the team balance directly from the admin panel.

form.name: Team Name
form.allowJoin: Allow users to join via invite link
form.allowJoinEnabled: Users can join this team with a valid invite link.
form.allowJoinDisabled: Invite links stay visible, but new users cannot join this team.
form.joinDisabledReasonPlaceholder: Explain why users cannot join this team right now.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Disabling a team blocks team-scoped access. Deleting a team permanently removes related team data.

confirm.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the team and related records. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.disableDescription: Disabling a team will block all team-scoped access until it is enabled again.
confirm.enableDescription: Enabling the team will restore team-scoped access for its members.

billing.title: Billing
billing.scanHint: Open Alipay on your phone and scan to pay

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.newHint: Store this API key in a safe and accessible place. For security reasons, you will not be able to view it again in API key management. If you lose it, you need to create a new one.
apiKeys.deleteWarning: This API key will be disabled immediately. Requests made with this key will be rejected and may break systems depending on it. Once deleted, you can no longer view or modify this API key.
apiKeys.createFolderFirst: No folders yet, click to create one

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
aiProviders.apiKeysHelp: Add API keys one by one and review them in the table
aiProviders.apiKeysRequired: Please add at least one API key

models.title: Models
models.deleteWarning: Are you sure to delete this model? Existing features may be affected. Please proceed with caution.
models.deletePlaceholder: Please input model ID to delete
models.modelIdHelp: Model ID is the unique identifier. To ensure uniqueness, the system appends random characters after the name you provide.
models.modelNameHelp: This name is used when calling provider APIs. Keep it consistent with provider-side configuration.
models.ownedByHelp: Used only for model icon display

account.changeEmailSuccess: Verification email sent, please check your inbox
account.sessionsDescription: All active sessions for your account
account.linkedAccountsDescription: All login methods linked to your account
account.cannotUnlinkLast: Cannot unlink the only login method

team.createDescription: Create a new team to organize your workspace.
team.nameTooLong: Team name must be at most 50 characters
team.nameInvalid: Team name can only contain Chinese, English, numbers and spaces
team.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of teams.

auth.fillValidPhoneFirst: Please fill a valid phone number first
auth.termsPrefix: By signing up or logging in, you agree to our
auth.termsSuffix: . Unregistered phone numbers will be signed up automatically.

notFound.title: 404: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, we searched everywhere but could not find the page you requested.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.pickDescription: Customize your avatar style and options.

folders.title: Folders
folders.deleteWarning: Deleting this folder will unlink all API keys in it. The API keys themselves will not be deleted.
folders.apiKeyCountLoading: Counting API keys in this folder...
folders.apiKeyCountLabel: This folder currently contains {{count}} API keys.
folders.deleteAllApiKeys: Delete all API keys in this folder as well
folders.deleteAllApiKeysDisabledHint: Disabled: deleting the folder will only unlink API keys from it and keep the API keys themselves.
folders.deleteAllApiKeysDangerTitle: Danger: all API keys in this folder will be deleted
folders.deleteAllApiKeysDangerDescription: A total of {{count}} API keys will be deleted together with this folder. This action is irreversible and any requests depending on those keys will fail immediately.
folders.adminDeleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? API keys inside it will be unlinked.

announcement.title: Announcement
announcement.description: Publish an announcement that will be displayed to all users.
